hipaa.name: HIPAA
hipaa.fullName: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act

privacy.title: Privacy Rule Requirements
items: Minimum necessary standard - only access/disclose PHI needed for the task
Patient authorization required for most uses beyond treatment/payment/operations
Notice of Privacy Practices must be provided
Patient rights: access, amendment, accounting of disclosures
De-identification standards (Safe Harbor or Expert Determination)

security.title: Security Rule Requirements
items: Administrative safeguards: security management, workforce training, contingency planning
Physical safeguards: facility access controls, workstation security, device controls
Technical safeguards: access controls, audit controls, integrity controls, transmission security

breach.title: Breach Notification Requirements
items: Notify affected individuals within 60 days of discovery
Notify HHS for breaches affecting 500+ individuals
Document and retain breach investigation records for 6 years

implementation: AES-256 encryption for all PHI storage
AWS: Enable default encryption on S3, RDS, EBS
GCP: Enable default encryption on Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL
Key management via AWS KMS or GCP Cloud KMS
TLS 1.2+ for all data transmission
Certificate management and rotation
No PHI in URLs or query parameters

accessControl.requirement: Unique user identification and role-based access
implementation: RBAC with principle of least privilege
Multi-factor authentication for PHI access
Automatic session timeout (15-30 minutes recommended)
Emergency access procedures documented

auditLogging.requirement: Audit controls to record and examine system activity
implementation: Log all PHI access (read, write, delete)
Include user identity, timestamp, action, data accessed
Retain logs for minimum 6 years
Regular log review procedures
Tamper-evident log storage
BAA required with LLM provider (Anthropic offers BAAs for enterprise)
PHI should not be used for model training without explicit authorization
Consider de-identification before LLM processing where possible
Implement human-in-the-loop for clinical decisions
Document AI system as part of risk assessment
Audit logging must include LLM interactions

baaRequirements.description: Business Associate Agreement required when sharing PHI
mustInclude: Permitted uses and disclosures of PHI
baaRequirements.anthropicNote: Anthropic offers BAAs for Claude API enterprise customers. Contact sales for healthcare deployments.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: System availability for operation and use

processingIntegrity.title: Processing Integrity
processingIntegrity.description: System processing is complete, valid, accurate, timely

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Information designated as confidential is protected

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Personal information handling meets privacy notice

fedramp.name: FedRAMP
fedramp.fullName: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
applicableWhen: Cloud services for US federal agencies

high.description: Severe or catastrophic effect from loss

architectureImplications.personnelSecurity: Background checks for personnel with access

keyConsiderations: PHI handling in conversations requires BAA
Conversation logs are PHI - apply retention and access controls
Human oversight required for clinical guidance
Integration with EHR requires additional security review
Audit trail for all AI-generated content
Training data considerations if using customer data

benefits_navigation.description: AI for health insurance benefits questions
keyConsiderations: May handle PHI in benefit inquiries
May be able to use de-identified data
